subject: A horned, red-skinned humanoid figure restrained mid-air by glowing white-blue magical bindings, with two robed Azorius enforcers flanking it
description: A red-skinned, sharply-horned creature is suspended in the center of the frame, arms wrenched outward by ribbons of luminous white-and-blue energy that wrap and constrict its torso and limbs. The bindings form a glowing cocoon of swirling spell-light around the captive, with feathered wisps of pale magic radiating outward. To either side stand two robed figures in cobalt-blue and white hooded vestments — Azorius lawmages — who appear to be channeling the binding spell from offscreen gestures. The composition is symmetrical and ceremonial, framed almost like an arrest or judicial restraint. The palette pairs the warm vermillion of the captive against the cool sapphire and ivory of the binding magic and the lawmages' robes.
foreground: horned red creature wrapped in glowing magical bindings
background: two hooded lawmages in blue and white robes flanking the captive against an indistinct pale interior
emotion: captive figure strains in pain or defiance; lawmages are impassive and ceremonial
